Caregiver Resource Library

Trusted help, gathered in one place.

Vetted organizations and tools for caregiving, grief, hospice, and crisis support. Filter by what you need, or search. You don't have to figure this out alone.

If you or someone you love is in immediate danger, call your local emergency number. In the US, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) any time, day or night.
Loading resources…

About this library

How it's built — and how to add to it

Every entry here is loaded from a single file (data/resources.json), so the library is easy to grow without touching the page. Add an entry with a title, category, type, region, link, and a short description, and it appears automatically with working filters and search.

A note on trust: these are starting points, not endorsements or medical advice. Always confirm details directly with each organization. Review and localize this list for your audience.

© 2026 The Cardinal Companion. Back to home · Crisis support: call or text 988 (US).
